{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Archmage of binding magic
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic]] is a certified [[Archmage of binding magic]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
